originalTitle: Fears for press freedom as billionaire takes control of East Africa's largest media house
title: Fears for press freedom as billionaire takes control of East Africa's largest media house
content: Rostam Aziz's purchase raises questions about continued journalistic independence in the region.

originalTitle: France returns sacred 'talking drum' looted during colonial rule to Ivory Coast
title: France returns sacred 'talking drum' looted during colonial rule to Ivory Coast
content: The move forms part of a broader process of returning cultural artefacts to African countries that started in 2017.‎

originalTitle: Ghana star to deny rape charges, UK court hears
title: Ghana star to deny rape charges, UK court hears
content: Partey is to appear at crown court next month, charged with raping a woman in December 2020.

originalTitle: Man City held at West Ham to lose ground on Premier League leaders Arsenal
title: Man City held at West Ham to lose ground on Premier League leaders Arsenal
content: Manchester City draw 1-1 with relegation-threatened West Ham to fall nine points behind Arsenal in Premier League race.

originalTitle: Trinidad and Tobago extends state of emergency for another three months
title: Trinidad and Tobago extends state of emergency for another three months
content: The Caribbean nation has spent 10 of the last 14 months under an emergency status that curtails key civil liberties.

originalTitle: Real Madrid beat Elche to pressure Barcelona for La Liga title
title: Real Madrid beat Elche to pressure Barcelona for La Liga title
content: Federico Valverde scores his fifth goal in three games as Real Madrid beat Elche 4-1 to move one point behind Barcelona.

originalTitle: Three more Iran football team members change minds over asylum
title: Three more Iran football team members change minds over asylum
content: Four of seven members of the women's football delegation who originally sought to stay in Australia have now chosen to return home.

originalTitle: Hamas urges key ally Iran to halt attacks on Gulf states
title: Hamas urges key ally Iran to halt attacks on Gulf states
content: The Palestinian group also affirms Tehran's right to defend itself from "aggression" by the US and Israel.

originalTitle: Treasure hunter freed from prison after refusing to turn over shipwreck gold
title: Treasure hunter freed from prison after refusing to turn over shipwreck gold
content: Tommy Thompson spent more than a decade in prison after refusing to disclose the whereabouts of 500 missing gold coins.

originalTitle: Record-breaker Dowman scores late as Arsenal beat Everton
title: Record-breaker Dowman scores late as Arsenal beat Everton
content: Sixteen-year-old Max Dowman becomes the youngest scorer in Premier League history, as Arsenal score twice in the last 10 minutes to beat Everton 2-0 and move 10 points clear at the top of the table.

originalTitle: Man City held by West Ham who move out of relegation zone
title: Man City held by West Ham who move out of relegation zone
content: West Ham come from behind to earn a point against Manchester City as Nuno Espirito Santo's side move out of the bottom three, while Pep Guardiola's side drop nine points behind leaders Arsenal in the Premier League.

originalTitle: Gordon goal gives Newcastle rare win at Chelsea
title: Gordon goal gives Newcastle rare win at Chelsea
content: Chelsea's hopes of qualifying for the Champions League are dealt a blow as Newcastle's Anthony Gordon scores the only goal of the game, to clinch a first away win at Stamford Bridge since 2012 for the Magpies.
